name: Gray Fullbuster
description: Gray is a tall man who is toned and muscular. He has spiky black-colored hair with dark blue eyes.  His Fairy Tail guild-mark is dark blue and is located below his collarbone on his pectoral muscle. As a striper, Gray doesn't always wears clothes, but when he is wearing clothes, he doesn't consistently wear the kind of clothes, though he seems to wear a white coat occasionally. Gray's noticeable pieces of clothing is a necklace, which resembles a sword with a stone on it, a metal bracelet and a chain that is attached to belt loops on the right side of his pants.
creator: Stinkabutt1234567899$$$
